name: comparison
description: Evaluate and improve comparison slides — before/after, current/future, option A vs B
goal: Achieve consistent 12+/14 with metrics-as-hero pattern, semantic red/green, flat layout (no cards)

prompts.text: Build a comparison slide: Current State (manual, 3 weeks, $4.2M) vs Future State (automated, 2 days, $2.1M)
Build a comparison of 3 CRM vendors across 5 criteria with scoring
Build a comparison slide of three pricing options (Basic, Professional, Enterprise) across cost, features, and ROI
Build a build-vs-buy comparison for an AI assistant platform with cost, time, risk, and flexibility rows
Build a before-vs-after operating model slide: 14 approvals and 21 days before, 5 approvals and 4 days after
Build a comparison slide of North America vs Europe sales performance across revenue, margin, win rate, and pipeline
Build a scenario comparison slide for Base, Upside, and Downside cases with revenue and EBITDA outcomes
Build a competitor comparison slide showing our product vs Competitor A vs Competitor B across five buyer criteria
Build a comparison of monolith vs modular monolith vs microservices across speed, cost, complexity, and scalability
Build a comparison slide showing current SLA performance vs target SLA across uptime, MTTR, and incident frequency
